name: Sassy Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. Place graham crackers on an ungreased cookie sheet and set aside.
2. In a large saucepan, bring butter and brown sugar to a boil over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat and gradually add the chopped pecans and vanilla.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over the graham crackers.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes.
6. Cut each cracker into 4 pieces while still warm.
7. Variation: Place 10 Hershey bars on top while the crackers are still hot! YUM!
